name: am-will/swarms
summary: Dependency-aware workflow skills for Codex and Claude that make parallel execution safer through explicit `depends_on` plans, wave execution, and TDD-oriented validation.
evidence: Defines explicit swarm-planner and parallel-task skills with dependency-aware task plans and wave-based execution.
Subagent execution requires validation evidence and plan updates, making the workflow more concrete than a generic skill pack.
